heading: Availability of land and water conservation fund moneys
label: 460v–7 Availability of land and water conservation fund moneys
text: Funds hereafter appropriated and available for the acquisition of lands and waters and interests therein in the national forest system pursuant to shall be available for the acquisition of any lands, waters, and interests therein within the boundaries of the recreation area.section 200306 of title 54
notes: Amendments2014— substituted “” for “section 460–9 of this title,”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200306 of title 54l
amendments: Amendments2014— substituted “” for “section 460–9 of this title,”.Pub. L. 113–287section 200306 of title 54l
